story: At a fair, another ILII displayed a bubble whose organic film could think. One thinker named its own beginning the Big Bang. Offended, the owner kept puffing the same bubble larger and larger. I warned that bubbles pop, but he shrugged and said he could always blow a new one. Annoyed and curious about the thinkers inside, I began planning to take him out and steal the bubble so its film could keep thinking instead of being stretched toward disaster. After that, I kept waiting and watching while he continued parading the swelling bubble.
implausible_knowledge: Annoyed and curious about the thinkers inside, I began planning to take him out and steal the bubble so its film could keep thinking instead of being stretched toward disaster.
question: When the narrator approaches him again later, what is the other ILII most likely to do with his prize bubble?
answer_with_knowledge: Back away from the narrator, stop inflating the bubble, and guard it carefully.
answer_without_knowledge: Keep showing off the bubble and continue puffing it larger.
